abilities.description: Put three +1/+1 counters on each Myr you control. Activate only during your turn.

effect.description: Put three +1/+1 counters on each Myr you control. Activate only during your turn.
effect.name: PutCounterAll

triggers.description: Whenever you cast a Myr spell, create a 1/1 colorless Myr artifact creature token.
At the beginning of combat on your turn, untap each Myr you control.
